rationale: One-line mechanical change following the existing kwarg-passthrough convention (action_runner/loops_dir/circuit/working_dir already propagate this way); closes a silent gap where nested sub-loops would stay on cli after the default flip, undercutting EPIC-2456's savings goal; Option B's no-config gap has no documented intent and is actively risky for ll-loop simulate since _dispatch_live() bypasses the SimulationActionRunner stub.
rule: Option A: propagate orchestration_config into nested loop: child executor and ll-loop simulate's executor construction
alternatives_rejected: Option B: leave the no-config else: cli branch as-is and document it as an intentional gap
